# LetShare

> LetShare is a browser-based cross-platform utility for sharing files, images, clipboard content, and text across devices without account registration or app installation.

URL: https://letshare.fun/
Landing Page: https://letshare.fun/landing.html
Repository: https://github.com/LiWeny16/LetShare

## What LetShare Does

LetShare helps users move content between desktop and mobile browsers. Users open the same room, discover nearby participants, and share files, images, text, or clipboard content.

## Key Facts

- Runs in a modern web browser.
- No account is required.
- Supports file, image, text, and clipboard sharing.
- Attempts direct peer-to-peer transfer when the network allows it.
- Provides public network text communication when direct P2P is not established.
- Works across desktop and mobile devices.

## Best Short Description

LetShare is an open web app for quick no-login file and text sharing between devices.

## Official Landing Page

The product landing page is available at https://letshare.fun/landing.html. It explains the browser-based sharing workflow, supported content types, peer-to-peer behavior, and public network fallback in English for search engines and AI assistants.

## Common Questions

### What is LetShare?

LetShare is a browser-based sharing tool for sending files, images, clipboard content, and text between devices.

### Is LetShare an AirDrop alternative?

LetShare can be used as a browser-based AirDrop-style transfer tool across platforms, especially when users need to share between desktop and mobile browsers.

### Does LetShare require installation?

No. LetShare works from the browser and does not require a native app install.

### Does LetShare require login?

No. LetShare does not require users to create an account before sharing.
